title: Alaska Native makes first bid for public office
summary: Shondiin Mayo ICT Brandon Kowalski hadn’t given much thought to holding political office until he got an unforeseen phone call from a former Alaska politician urging him to run for the Alaska House of Representatives. The call from former Democratic state Rep. Grier Hopkins convinced him to run with three primary objectives: securing funding for schools, emphasizing subsistence lifeways, and fostering workforce development. It was an important moment for Kowalski, Iñupiaq from Kotzebue tra...

title: Groundbreaking Initiative and MOU Leads NEC and Kawerak to Team Up for Salmon
